tactical.en: Boss gains {B/BT_SHIELD_BASED_CASTER} on S1 - use {D/BT_REMOVE_BUFF} to remove it.
tactical.jp: ボスはS1で{B/BT_SHIELD_BASED_CASTER}を獲得 - {D/BT_REMOVE_BUFF}で解除。
tactical.zh: 首领在S1获得{B/BT_SHIELD_BASED_CASTER} - 使用{D/BT_REMOVE_BUFF}解除。

tactical.en: {E/Dark} units have 50% reduced action point cost.
Single target attacks deal 70% reduced damage and restore 3 WG to the boss.
tactical.jp: 単体攻撃は70%のダメージ減少、ボスのWGを3回復。
tactical.kr: 단일 공격은 70% 피해 감소, 보스 WG 3 회복.
tactical.zh: 单体攻击伤害降低70%，恢复首领WG 3点。

tactical.en: Non-attack skills deal 10,000 fixed damage to the boss twice.
tactical.jp: 非攻撃スキルはボスに10,000の固定ダメージを2回与える。
tactical.kr: 비공격 스킬은 보스에게 10,000 고정 피해를 2회 부여.
tactical.zh: 非攻击技能对首领造成2次10,000固定伤害。
